title: More basic gates: OR and NOT
description: Learn to use the OR and NOT gates.

steps.instruction: Place an OR gate on the canvas
steps.hint: Click the Gates tab in the left panel, then drag the OR gate onto the canvas.

steps.instruction: Add two InputSwitch elements to the canvas
steps.hint: Click the I/O tab in the left panel, then drag two InputSwitch elements onto the canvas and place them to the left of the OR gate.

steps.instruction: Connect both input switches to the OR gate
steps.hint: Click and drag from an InputSwitch output port (right side) to one of the OR gate input ports (left side). Repeat for the second switch.

steps.instruction: Add an LED and connect it to the OR gate output
steps.hint: Drag an LED from the I/O tab and place it to the right of the OR gate. Then connect the OR gate output port (right side) to the LED input port (left side).

steps.instruction: Play around with the inputs and notice how the OR gate outputs 1 when any of its inputs are 1
Disconnect the LED from the OR gate, then connect the OR gate to a NOT gate and the NOT gate to the LED
steps.hint: Drag the wire between the OR gate and the LED to remove it.

steps.instruction: The NOT gate inverts the signal. Now, the circuit will output 1 only when none of the inputs are 1
